description: This Java source file defines the DocumentStorageService class, which provides filesystem storage operations for documents including writing, resolving, and deleting document bytes in a Spring Boot application context.

classes.name: DocumentStorageService
classes.description: Service class responsible for storing, resolving, and deleting document files on the filesystem, with storage paths organized by user and document IDs.

methods.name: DocumentStorageService
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the storage root path from application properties.

methods.name: write
methods.description: Stores document bytes from an InputStream under a specific user and document ID, returning a storage key relative to the root.

methods.name: resolveToPath
methods.description: Resolves a given storage key to an absolute filesystem path, validating the path to prevent traversal.

methods.name: deleteIfExists
methods.description: Deletes the stored document file if it exists, attempting to clean up empty parent directories.
